controls.label: Controls
controls.text: Use mouse to pan. Scroll to zoom.

name: Choropleth Map
description: Thematic area shading by data values

controls.label: Choropleth
controls.text: Polygons colored by population density. Hover to see details.

name: Click Coordinates
description: Capture click coordinates on the map

controls.label: Instructions
controls.text: Click anywhere on the map to see coordinates.

controls.label: Instructions
controls.text: Right-click on the map to open the context menu.

controls.label: Custom Marker
controls.text: Animated pulsing marker with click popup.

name: Drawing Tools
description: Draw points, lines, and polygons on the map

controls.label: Drawing Tools
controls.text: Select geometry type and draw on the map.

controls.label: Custom Controls
controls.text: A custom 'N' button that resets map rotation to north.

controls.label: Fullscreen
controls.text: Click the fullscreen button to toggle fullscreen mode.

controls.label: Geofence
controls.text: Click to place the marker. It changes color when inside/outside the geofence.

name: Geolocation
description: User position tracking with accuracy circle

controls.label: Geolocation
controls.text: Tracks your current position using browser geolocation API.

controls.label: Heatmap
controls.text: Density visualization using heat gradient.

name: Image Overlay
description: Overlay an image on the map

controls.label: Image Overlay
controls.text: An image is overlaid on the map area.

name: Mini Map
description: Overview minimap synced to main view

controls.label: Mini Map
controls.text: Small overview map in the corner synced with the main view.

controls.label: Polygons
controls.text: Colored polygons with rotation slider.

controls.label: Scale Bar
controls.text: Distance scale displayed in the corner.

name: Store Locator
description: Store locator with search and filtering

controls.label: Store Locator
controls.text: Find stores by searching or filtering by category.

controls.label: WASD Navigation
controls.text: Use W/A/S/D keys to pan the map. Use Q/E to zoom.

controls.label: Weather Overlay
controls.text: Weather radar and temperature data overlay.

name: Turf Buffer
description: Calculate 500km buffer around clicked point using Turf.js

controls.label: Turf.js Buffer
controls.text: Click anywhere to calculate a 500km buffer polygon using Turf.js.

name: Turf Intersection
description: Find intersection of two overlapping polygons using Turf.js

controls.label: Turf.js Intersection
controls.text: Two overlapping polygons. The intersection area is highlighted in green.

name: Turf Voronoi
description: Generate Voronoi polygons from points using Turf.js

controls.label: Turf.js Voronoi
controls.text: Click to add points. Voronoi polygons update automatically.

name: Turf Convex Hull
description: Create convex hull from points using Turf.js

controls.label: Turf.js Convex Hull
controls.text: Click to add points. The convex hull encloses all points.

controls.label: Turf.js Point-in-Polygon
controls.text: Click to test if a point is inside the polygon.

controls.label: Turf.js Nearest Point
controls.text: Click to find the nearest of 5 predefined points.

name: Turf Area Measurement
description: Measure area of drawn polygon using Turf.js

controls.label: Turf.js Area
controls.text: Click to add vertices. The area is calculated automatically.

controls.label: Turf.js Great Circle
controls.text: Geodesic curve between New York and London.

controls.label: Line Animation
controls.text: Watch a line being drawn progressively.

controls.label: Clustering
controls.text: Markers grouped into clusters. Click to expand.

controls.label: GeoJSON Upload
controls.text: Drag a GeoJSON file onto the map to visualize it.

controls.label: Hover Effect
controls.text: Hover over zones to see highlighting and tooltips.

controls.label: Realtime Data
controls.text: Live stream of data points. Watch the counter increase.

controls.label: Map Styles
controls.text: Switch between different map styles.

name: Time Slider
description: Temporal data visualization with time slider

controls.label: Time Slider
controls.text: Drag the slider to see how data changes over time.

controls.label: Fly-To
controls.text: Click buttons to animate the map to different locations.

controls.label: Layer Control
controls.text: Switch between OpenStreetMap, Topographic, and Dark CARTO layers.

name: Mouse Follow
description: Marker that follows the mouse cursor

controls.label: Mouse Follow
controls.text: An overlay follows your mouse cursor across the map.

controls.label: Popup & Tooltip
controls.text: Click for popups, hover for tooltips on vector features.

controls.label: Synced Maps
controls.text: Two maps side-by-side with synchronized panning and zooming.

description: Side-by-side map comparison with synced views

controls.label: Sync Comparison
controls.text: Drag the divider to compare Street vs Satellite layers.
